brand.name: TutorOS AI
brand.tagline: Tutoring driven by data, not guesswork.

landing.heroTitle: Tutoring that knows what your child doesn't know yet.
landing.heroSubtitle: TutorOS AI diagnoses knowledge gaps, picks the right learning path and helps your tutor teach from data — not guesswork.
landing.pillar1Desc: A short adaptive test reveals what your child actually knows and where the gaps are — before you spend on tutoring.
landing.pillar2Desc: Our algorithm matches a tutor to the specific gaps from the diagnosis, not to star ratings.
landing.pillar3Desc: After each lesson you see what your child mastered and what to work on next. No subjective impressions.
landing.promiseBody: After 4 lessons you receive a measurable progress report and a recommendation for the next learning path.
landing.step1: Create an account and pick a subject
landing.step4: Learn — the system collects data from every lesson
landing.step5: Receive a report and a next-step recommendation

auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.checkEmail: Check your inbox and confirm your email.

discover.title: Find your tutor
discover.subtitle: Browse verified tutors matched to your learning goals.
discover.noTutors: No published tutors yet — be the first!

circles.title: Learning Circles
circles.subtitle: Small groups of 3-6 people learning together.
circles.empty: No circles yet. Create the first one!

peer.title: Peer Help
peer.subtitle: Quick help from other students. Help others — earn Karma.
peer.empty: No open requests. Be the first to ask!

brain.title: Second Brain
brain.subtitle: All your learning in one place — searchable in natural language.
brain.noTranscripts: Your transcripts will show up here after your first session.

dashboard.studentSubtitle: Learn deliberately. The system collects data from every lesson so you know what's next.
dashboard.parentSubtitle: Measurable learning outcomes, based on lesson and diagnosis data.
dashboard.tutorSubtitle: Focus on teaching — TutorOS AI handles reports and progress analysis.
dashboard.adminSubtitle: Verifications, payment disputes, AI quality, platform audit.
